summary_text: ### 修正対象 [`scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs) ### 修正内容（diff形式） 新規追加のため、diff は追加のみです。 ```diff --- /dev/null +++ /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs @@ +#!/usr/bin/env node + +import { + appendFileSync, + existsSync, + mkdirSync, + readFileSync, + renameSync, + writeFileSync, +} from "node:fs"; +import os from "node:os"; +import path from "node:path"; +import process from "node:process"; +import { spawn } from "node:child_process"; + +import failoverModule from "./lib/failover.js"; +import timeoutTrackerModule from "./lib/timeout-tracker.js"; +import outputFormatModule from "./lib/output-format.js"; + +const { getFailoverChain, isFailoverEligible } = failoverModule; +const { getAdaptiveTimeout, recordLatency } = timeoutTrackerModule; +const { generateRunId, stripAnsi } = outputFormatModule; + +const PROVIDER_STATE_FILE = path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "state", "fugue-provider-state.json"); +const LANE_RUNS_LOG = path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "state", "lane-runs.jsonl"); +const LANE_OUTPUT_DIR = path.join(os.homedir(), ".claude", "cache", "lane-outputs"); + +const PROVIDER_SCRIPTS = { + codex: { file: "delegate.js", extraArgs: [] }, + "codex-spark": { file: "delegate.js", extraArgs: ["--spark"] }, + glm: { file: "delegate-glm.js", extraArgs: [] }, + gemini: { file: "delegate-gemini.js", extraArgs: [] }, +}; + +function parseArgs(argv) { ... } +function parseLaneSpec(spec) { ... } +function writeJsonAtomic(filePath, value) { ... } +function appendJsonl(filePath, record) { ... } +function summarizeText(text, maxChars = 2000) { ... } + +function getBridgeFailoverChain(provider, agent) { + if (provider === "glm") { + return [{ provider: "codex-spark", agent: mapAgentForFailover("codex-spark", agent) }]; + } + if (provider === "gemini") { + return []; + } + return getFailoverChain(provider, agent); +} + +function updateProviderState({ requestedProvider, provider, agent, ok, latencyMs, error, failedOverFrom }) { ... } +function persistLaneOutput(record) { ... } +function buildSpawnSpec(provider, agent, task, project, runId) { ... } +function spawnLane(command, args, options) { ... } +async function runSingleAttempt(...) { ... } +async function runLaneWithFailover(...) { ... } + +function validateMatrixDiversity(matrix) { ... } +async function handleSingleLane(args) { ... } +async function handleMatrix(args) { ... } +function handleStatus() { ... } + +async function main() { + const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2)); + if (args.status) process.exit(handleStatus()); + if (args.matrix) process.exit(await handleMatrix(args)); + if (args.lane) process.exit(await handleSingleLane(args)); + printUsage(1); +} + +await main(); ``` 補足: - `--lane provider:agent --task ... --project ...` を実装 - `--matrix path.json` を `Promise.allSettled` で並列実行 - `--status` で `~/.claude/state/fugue-provider-state.json` を表示 - provider state 永続化、JSONL 実行ログ、lane output キャッシュを追加 - failover は `codex -> glm`, `glm -> codex-spark`, `gemini -> skip` - stdout は 2000 文字以内に要約、詳細は `~/.claude/cache/lane-outputs/` に保存 - exit code は `0/1/2` を仕様どおり実装 仮定: - `glm -> codex-spark` の agent 名は Codex 側互換が必要なため、`general-reviewer -> code-reviewer` などの最小マッピングをブリッジ内で定義しました。 ### 検証結果 - `node --check /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs` - 成功 - `node /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --status` - 成功 - 出力: `No provider state recorded.` 実施していないもの: - 実 lane 実行の統合検証 - 既存 `delegate-*.js` が外部 CLI/API 依存のため、無害な範囲の検証に留めています。
